sections.paragraph:
Κλεόβιος, ου (Suda K 1717 [ὄνομα ἱερέως εἰδώλων], s. also AcPt 3 [Aa I 48, 6]) Cleobius, a gnostic in Corinth AcPlCor 1:2 (perh. the same mentioned Eus., HE 4, 22, 5). AcPl Ha 6, 28.

Suda Suda = a lexical work (freq. cited as Suidas in handbooks); X a.d.—List 5

Aa Aa = Acta apostolorum apocrypha—List 5

AcPlCor AcPlCor = Acts of Paul: correspondence with Corinthians (a.k.a. Third Corinthians), text according to PBodmer X—List 1

perh. perh. = perhaps

Eus. Eus. = Eusebius of Caesarea, various works; IV a.d.—List 5

AcPl Ha AcPl Ha = Acts of Paul, PHamb—List 1

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 547
